# Mustikatama Group

> Diversified industrial group headquartered in Lumajang, East Java, Indonesia. Operating across timber panels, wood-working and agricultural processing through three specialist subsidiaries. Founded 1989.

## Group Overview

- **Full name:** Mustikatama Group
- **Type:** Diversified industrial holding group
- **Founded:** 1989
- **Location:** Jl. Raya Lumajang–Tempeh KM 7, Lumajang 67371, East Java, Indonesia
- **Workers:** 1,500+ combined across all subsidiaries
- **Industries:** Timber & wood-working | Agricultural processing
- **Export reach:** Asia, Americas, Europe, Africa, Oceania (5 continents)

## Subsidiaries

### MBS — PT Mustika Buana Sejahtera
- Plywood and blockboard manufacturer
- CARB Phase II and JAS certified
- Est. 2006 | Website: https://mbs.mustikatama.com

### MBJ — PT Mustika Bahana Jaya
- Finger-Joint Laminated Board (FJLB) manufacturer
- Species: Rubberwood, Merkusii Pine, Albizia Falcata
- Est. 1996 | Website: https://mbj.mustikatama.com

### KSMT — PT Karya Setya Mustikatama
- Agricultural processing: grain (gabah), rice (beras), onion (bawang)
- Lumajang, East Java's agricultural corridor
- Website: https://ksmt.mustikatama.com
